name: next_preserves_inv_rec_intensional_bridge
code:
proof fn phi_3_next_preserves_inv_rec_intensional_bridge(ex: Execution<int>, next: TempPred<int>, inv: TempPred<int>, i: nat)
    requires
        inv.satisfied_by(ex),
        forall |idx: nat| next.satisfied_by(#[trigger] ex.suffix(idx)),
        forall |idx: nat| inv.satisfied_by(#[trigger] ex.suffix(idx)) && next.satisfied_by(ex.suffix(idx))
            ==> inv.satisfied_by(ex.suffix(idx + 1)),
    ensures
        inv.satisfied_by(ex.suffix(i)),
{
    next_preserves_inv_rec::<int>(ex, next, inv, i);
}
reason: next_preserves_inv_rec is external_body performing induction on suffix chains — bridges intensional gaps in suffix composition and closure evaluation at each inductive step without proof
